cross_scene_arcs.title: B-9 Android Saga
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Data investigates a positronic signature, retrieves his detached head, assembles B-9 as a brother, doubts his capabilities, and deactivates him.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The ethical implications of deactivating a self-acknowledged brother

cross_scene_arcs.title: Bond with Captain Picard
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Data's relationship with Picard deepens from expressing missing him to discussing aspiration, culminating in sacrificing his life to save Picard.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Scimitar Infiltration and Sacrifice
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Data infiltrates the Scimitar as B-9, completes intelligence gathering, and sacrifices himself to destroy the enemy ship after ensuring Picard's escape.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Bond with Data and Loss
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Picard's relationship with Data deepens through shared reflections and trust, leading to Data's sacrifice to save Picard and Picard's mourning of his friend.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Picard and Data share personal reflections over wine, strengthening their bond.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Data dies destroying the Scimitar to save Picard, and Picard leads the crew in mourning.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Picard's grief over Data's death and the impact on the crew.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Shinzon Threat and Resolution
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Picard investigates Shinzon's rise on Romulus, confronts his clone, faces escalating threats including thalaron radiation, and ultimately battles and defeats Shinzon.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Picard is assigned a diplomatic mission to Romulus to assess a new political leader.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Shinzon is killed in battle, and the Scimitar is destroyed, neutralizing the threat.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The aftermath of the conflict and Picard's personal role in killing his clone.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Farewells and New Beginnings
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Picard acknowledges the departure of close crew members, reflects on the changes, farewells Riker, and embraces a new exploration mission.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Picard toasts to family and acknowledges impending departures at Riker and Troi's wedding.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Picard assigns a new mission to explore the Denab system, signaling a fresh start.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Adapting to the new crew composition and emotional impact of the losses.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Strategic Goals Shift
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Shinzon declares conquest of the Federation, later proposes peace, but ultimately rejects reconciliation and commits to destroying Earth.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Orders destruction of Enterprise and sets course for Earth
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether his mission will succeed before his death

cross_scene_arcs.title: Complex Bond with Picard and Others
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: From ordering Picard's capture to seeking connection, sharing his past, and telepathically intruding on Troi, their relationships deteriorate into violent confrontation and end in mutual destruction.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Dies in final battle with Picard
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The potential for understanding that was never realized

cross_scene_arcs.title: Progressive Physical Decline
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Shinzon's degenerative illness accelerates, influencing his decisions and leading to desperate actions and eventual death.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Illness interrupts him, requiring medical prep
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Dies from wounds and ship destruction
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How his condition drives his urgency and sacrifices

cross_scene_arcs.title: Identity Revelation and Assertion
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Shinzon reveals his human identity, shares his slave past, and later affirms his identity as Shinzon of Remus amidst conflict.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Revealed to be human, not Reman
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Affirms identity as Shinzon of Remus in confrontation with Picard
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: His internal conflict between humanity and his Reman upbringing
